package rulecoverage

func NegativeTimeoutlessHttpDefaultClientOrHelperCall() string {
    ruleID := "timeoutless_http_default_client_or_helper_call"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "net/http helper calls or http.DefaultClient usage that carry no explicit application timeout."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
